# Maintenance Marshall

> Multi-skilled property maintenance and technical services across Gauteng, South Africa. Electrical, plumbing, water systems, property maintenance, and security & automation — one call, total resolution.

Maintenance Marshall (Pty) Ltd is a Kempton Park–based maintenance company serving residential and commercial clients across Gauteng. 60% Black-owned, B-BBEE Level 2 targeting.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services overview, why-us, about, and contact form for quote requests.

## Contact

- Location: Kempton Park, South Africa
